commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Christ foretelleth the destruction of the temple9 the persecutions for the gospel: 10 that the gospel must be preached to all nations: 14that great calamities shall happen to the Jews: 24and the manner of his coming to judgment: 32the hour whereof being known to none, every man is to watch and pray, that we be not found unprovided, when he cometh to each one, particularly by death.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
